stemHtml:
Refer to CAP 698 figure 4.28
Given the following info for a commercial air transport turbojet powered aeroplane, what is the minimum field length required?

Landing mass: 54 000 kg
Airport pressure altitude: 1000 ft
Flaps: 40°
Runway condition: WET
Wind: 10 kt headwind
Anti-skid: Inoperative
Automatic or Manual spoilers
